math-desc: Muuji qaacidooyinka xisaabta ee u dhexeeya summadaha <math> ... </math>
popups-settings-option-math-tooltip: Sharax qaacidooyinka xisaabta marka dul la istaajiyo.
math-visualeditor-symbol-group-chem-dots: Elektaroono aan isqaban & dhibco radical ah
math-visualeditor-symbol-group-math-subs: Hoos qorid, kor qorid iyo isdhexgal
math-form-tex-help: Ku tijaabi gelinta TeX-kaaga gaarka ah. Eeg [[{{int:math-helppage}}|bogga caawinta ee qaacidooyinka xisaabta]] si aad u hesho caawimo dheeraad ah.
math-form-type-chem: chem (gelin leh taageero kiimiko; tusaale \ce{H2O} biyaha)
math_invalidjson: Jawaabta server-ka ee $1 waa JSON aan sax ahayn.
math_invalidresponse: $1: Jawaab aan sax ahayn ("$3") oo ka timid adeega "$2":
math_invalidxml: MathML ama SVG waa XML aan sax ahayn.
math_mathoid_error: Khalad beddelid. Adeegga ("$1") wuxuu soo sheegay: "$2"
math-status-introduction:
Boggan wuxuu soo bandhigayaa macluumaad ku saabsan {{PLURAL:$1|habka|hababka}} muuqaalaynta xisaabta ee shaqaynaya.

{{PLURAL:$1|Habkan muuqaalaynta ee soo socda waa|Hababkan muuqaalaynta ee soo socda waa}} shaqaynayaan:
math-test-end: Tijaabooyinka dhabarka ee habka soo bandhigista ''$1'' waa la dhammeeyay.
math-test-start: Waxaa socda tijaabooyinka dhabarka ee habka soo bandhigista ''$1''.
math-test-contains-diff: Xadhigga la soo celiyay $1 kuma jiro xadhigga la filayay $2.
math-test-equals-diff: Xadhigga la soo celiyay $1 wuu ka duwan yahay xadhigga la filayay $2.
math-tracking-category-error-desc: Bogagga ku jira qaybtaan waxay leeyihiin khaladaad ku saabsan isticmaalka calaamadda xisaabta.
math-tracking-category-mhchem-deprecatio: Bogagga adeegsada qaab duug ah oo laga joojiyay ee calaamadaha kiimikada
Bogagga ku jira qaybtan waxay adeegsadaan qaab duug ah oo laga joojiyay ee calaamadaha kiimikada
math-tracking-category-texvc-deprecation: Bogagga adeegsada qaab duug ah oo laga joojiyay ee calaamadaha xisaabta
Bogagga ku jira qaybtan waxay adeegsadaan qaab duug ah oo laga joojiyay ee calaamadaha xisaabta
math-tracking-category-render-error: Bogagga leh khaladaad ku jira soo bandhigista xisaabta
math-tracking-category-render-error-desc: Bogagga ku jira qaybtan waxay leeyihiin khaladaad ku jira soo bandhigista calaamadaha xisaabta.
mw-math-mathjax: Samee MathJax ee dhinaca macmiilka (biraawsarrada leh taageero MathML oo xaddidan)
mw-math-mathml: SVG (MathML waxaa lagu kicin karaa adigoo adeegsanaya plugin biraawsar)
mw-math-source: Isha LaTeX (loogu talagalay biraawsarrada qoraalka ku salaysan)
wikibase-listdatatypes-math-body: Goob xogeed suugaan ah oo loogu talagalay muujinta xisaabta, qaacidooyinka, isla'egyada iyo wixii la mid ah, laguna qoro nooc LaTeX ah.
math-wikibase-special-error-invalid-argu: Aqoonsiga Wikibase ee aad sheegtay ma jiro.
math-wikibase-special-error-unknown: Khalad aan la aqoon ayaa dhacay markii xog laga soo qaaday Wikibase.
